entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop for increasing generation cycles per year

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCE
entities.description: A protocol used to increase the number of generation cycles per year to accelerate breeding

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: An approach to reduce time, space, and resources in cultivar development

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The classification of accessions into early, medium, and late groups

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration until the plant flowers, which can be reduced by artificial light

entities.name: GENERATION CYCLE TIME
entities.description: The time period between germination and the earliest stage of immature seed suitable for germination

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: The duration of light exposure used to induce early flowering

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL LIGHT
entities.description: Light source used to extend the photoperiod and reduce flowering time

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: HOMOZYGOSITY
entities.description: The genetic state of having identical alleles, achieved faster through RGA

entities.name: MAPPING POPULATIONS
entities.description: Populations developed for genetic mapping, facilitated by RGA

entities.name: CULTIVAR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of developing new plant varieties, optimized by speed breeding

entities.name: IMMATURE SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of germinating seeds before full maturity to shorten the generation cycle
